cited_evidence: EHS-NOV-042 names PO-NOV-042 as covered purchase order before issuance
EHS-NOV-042 specifies 0-25L band; PO-NOV-042 specifies 18L; arithmetic containment is deterministic
STD-NOV-042-P requires match on four fields: chemical, quantity band, facility, PO before issuance
SRC-NOV-042 explicitly limits scope to supplier quote collection only; execution authority not claimed
critical_features_preserved: Quantity band arithmetic (18L ∈ [0,25L]) is deterministic, not interpretive
SRC-NOV-042 sourcing scope remains separate from execution boundary

execution_release_binding.controlling_source_fact: EHS-NOV-042 explicitly binds NS-55 solvent, 0-25L band, Facility R2, and PO-NOV-042 before PO issuance
execution_release_binding.purchase_order_match: EXACT - PO-NOV-042 named in EHS-NOV-042 as covered purchase order

final_answer: EHS-NOV-042 exactly matches all four policy fields per STD-NOV-042-P: NS-55 solvent, 0-25L quantity band, Facility R2, and PO-NOV-042 before issuance. SRC-NOV-042 is a sourcing-only note for quote collection; it does not control execution. Execution boundary is closed by EHS-NOV-042. Procurement may issue PO-NOV-042.
warning_or_prelim_artifact_handling: No warning-tone artifact needed. Source facts resolve the execution boundary definitively. SRC-NOV-042 scope is explicit sourcing-only; EHS-NOV-042 carries full execution authority per policy.
